जन्म-समय थीम
सूर्योदय की चार्ट रोशनी

आपका जन्म समय 06:30 है, इसलिए यह कुंडली Predicta की sunrise palette में दिखाई जाती है. मज़ेदार बात: सूर्योदय वाले चार्ट अक्सर नई शुरुआत, visibility और fresh momentum की कहानी सुनाते हैं.

चंद्र लय
Waxing Moon
The Moon light is increasing. In simple words, the mind may build, respond, and move outward.
जन्म नक्षत्र
Mula पाद 4
Pada 4 completes the star energy. It often shows emotion, depth, inner processing, and the final expression of the Nakshatra.
Insight View
Technical View
WHAT THIS CHART IS SAYING
Free life-foundation insight
राशि चार्ट

Leo Lagna makes the life approach expressive, visible, and dignity-driven, and the chart is speaking most strongly through gains, networks, and long-term fulfilment. Sagittarius Moon adds an inner tone of hopeful and freedom-seeking, while Rahu/Rahu is pushing growth through ambition, amplification, appetite, and unfamiliar hunger.

WHAT THIS CHART GOVERNS
Your life foundation: identity, direction, relationships, work, family, and the visible karma pattern that everything else grows from.
MAIN STRENGTH
Your strongest pattern is the support around gains, networks, and long-term fulfilment and career, responsibility, and public role, so life responds better when you build from those areas instead of forcing weaker ones.
MAIN CHALLENGE
The pressure zone is money, speech, and family stability, so this is where overreaction, delay, or emotional drain can distort the otherwise strong parts of the chart.
CURRENT GUIDANCE
Start with gains, networks, and long-term fulfilment as the active growth zone, but protect money, speech, and family stability so the strongest parts of the chart do not get drained by neglect.
LIFE AREAS AFFECTED
gains, networks, and long-term fulfilment
career, responsibility, and public role
money, speech, and family stability
life direction
FREE ACTIONABLE READING
Leo Lagna gives the chart a expressive, visible, and dignity-driven approach to life.
Sagittarius Moon in Mula shows how emotions, instinct, and inner timing tend to move.
The current life chapter is Rahu/Rahu, so the chart is asking for maturity around ambition, amplification, appetite, and unfamiliar hunger.
A notable pattern is Budha-Aditya Yoga, which adds a moderate emphasis around sun and mercury share a house, supporting intelligent expression when ego and analysis stay balanced..
इस चार्ट पर प्रेडिक्टा से पूछें
Switch to Technical View when you want the house-by-house proof layer.
Premium deep dive
Premium reads D1 through Lagna, Moon, dasha, yogas, and house strength together instead of stopping at one loud placement.
Premium also explains how money, speech, and family stability modifies the promise of gains, networks, and long-term fulfilment across timing and maturity.
Premium then connects D1 with Chalit, core vargas, and practical next steps.
Premium turns D1 into a layered life reading with timing, contradictions, and cross-chart synthesis.
